videos.title: Going off with Mayhem.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a Mayhem deck, featuring Fleem, Goben's Creation (Green Goblin) in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

0:20:09 - vs Gogo, Master of Mimicry
0:30:16 - vs Rofellos, Llanowar Emissary 
0:36:14 - vs Yuriko, the Tiger's Shadow
0:44:18 - vs Hearthhull, the Worldseed
0:56:08 - vs Gyruda, Doom of Depths
